item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Red Mage's Journey I & II
item.description:
A compilation of the first two volumes of the detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned red mage─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level red mage to 70 and complete all job quests up through “With Heart and Steel.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
